tasks.subject: Task 1: Add resolveGroupId seam to lib/api.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `resolveGroupId()` — the documented seam for "which group is active, or null → Welcome" — returning the seeded group today, with no behavior change anywhere.

**Files:**
- Modify: `mobile/lib/api.ts` (after the `GROUP_NAME` block, ~line 12)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- resolveGroupId(): string | null exported returning GROUP_ID
- TODO(group-onboarding) comment present
- no other imports changed (tabs still import GROUP_ID directly)
- `cd mobile && just check` passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/api.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolveGroupId(): string | null exported returning GROUP_ID", "TODO(group-onboarding) comment present", "no other imports changed", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Build Welcome marquee screen + register route
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the presentational `app/welcome.tsx` marquee and register it as a headerless route in the root stack, reachable at `/welcome`.

**Files:**
- Create: `mobile/app/welcome.tsx`
- Modify: `mobile/app/_layout.tsx` (add a `Stack.Screen` entry)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- /welcome renders marquee: night-950 bg, ember top glow, 92px logomark, Movie Night wordmark, HOW IT WORKS card + 3 rules, info Banner, 2 disabled CTAs (Start a group → primary, Enter an invite code ghost)
- no tagline
- tokens-only, ember = glow only
- route registered headerless in app/_layout.tsx
- `cd mobile && just check` passes

**Verify:** `cd mobile && just check`; manual at /welcome

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/welcome.tsx", "mobile/app/_layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/welcome renders marquee: glow, 92px logomark, Movie Night wordmark, HOW IT WORKS + 3 rules, info banner, 2 disabled CTAs", "no tagline", "tokens-only, ember = glow only", "route registered headerless", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
